node_naming.reason: All AC nodes prefixed ac1-, setup nodes prefixed setup-

assertions.reason: ac1-assert-button-disabled uses strict eq on both found and disabled fields

screenshots.reason: ac1-screenshot-submit-button taken before assertion; before/after pair captured

no_forbidden_patterns.reason: No wait>500ms, no switch default skipping AC, no DOM-only visual claim

setup_via_eval.reason: Zero balance injected via sm.account.pushData() — no UI navigation for setup

reverts_on_fix_revert.reason: With fix reverted, ac1-assert-button-disabled FAILS (disabled=false confirmed in before run)

better_version_guidance: Recipe is minimal and focused. A stronger version could also verify the button remains disabled after a short delay (stream data doesn't re-enable it), but that is not required for this AC.
